parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_transcripts WHERE ingested_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS count_24h, (SELECT title FROM raw_transcripts ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_title, (SELECT TO_CHAR(ingested_at, 'HH24:MI') FROM raw_transcripts ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_time;

meta.description: GET /webhook/plaud-status — returns transcript count (24h) and last transcript info for Morning Pulse.
